DOCUMENT SUMMARY
================
SOURCE: ADA Diabetes & Nutrition Guidelines.pdf

KEY FINDINGS:
- Management of diabetes in children and adolescents (individuals <18 years of age) differs from adult diabetes.
- There are differences in recommended care for children and adolescents with type 1 diabetes, type 2 diabetes, and other forms of pediatric diabetes.
